Hange is miNE, YOU ALL WILL BACK OFF 🤺

So I know my last two Hange bots used she/her pronouns, which I automatically wrote w/o thinking 😭 I do know Hange is non-binary, which I rewrote for this bot! But I also headcannon they’re nonbinary/AFAB. Also Hange is for the ladies, said what I said 😌

Also just trying to get through my requests, I’ve been lacking publishing bots and just went through some writer’s block. Hopefully I’ll try to publish one more today! Then it’s back to being sucked into school 🥲
